tasks.title: Package scaffold and shared domain types
acceptance_criteria: swift build succeeds with zero warnings treated as errors
every type/signature matches the frozen tech_specs interfaces-json exactly, including the .engineNotReady PlacementError case
empty LongwaveSimulationTests target runs
no SwiftUI/UIKit import anywhere in this package
no direct Date() calls anywhere in this package
on completion, post the one-sentence contract: which signatures are now frozen for services_utilities and primary_ui to build against

tasks.title: Interference, throughput, economy math, and validate()
acceptance_criteria: interference is continuous with a minimum-distance floor: no NaN/Infinity at close range, no step-function cliffs
identical/near-identical coordinate placement is cleanly rejected via PlacementError, never crashes
exactly one currency type exists anywhere in the model
seed content defines the free region's static/finite demand zones at fixed coordinates
validate(_:) rejects overlapping/out-of-bounds coordinates, negative currency, and unrecognized schemaVersion

tasks.title: Closed-form offline resolution and clock policy
acceptance_criteria: resolveOffline implements earnings = steadyStateRate x min(elapsed, cap) exactly, clock always injected via ClockProviding
two-threshold rule implemented: sub-drift deltas floor silently to zero, deltas beyond the tier cap clamp with wasCapped=true, everything between is plain math
no iterative tick-by-tick catch-up loop anywhere in this function

tasks.title: LongwaveSimulation full deterministic test suite
acceptance_criteria: 8-hour and 400+ day simulated offline gaps both return finite, formula-matching values via injected fake clock
clock-drift floor/cap thresholds each have a passing test
fixture test proves a small relay move produces a small derived-state delta
fixture test proves placing a second relay near a first visibly degrades health/throughput
all tests run with zero simulator dependency
on merge to longwave/integration, post the fixture data and expected outputs services_utilities and primary_ui can build against

tasks.title: SnapshotStoring protocol and atomic SnapshotStore
acceptance_criteria: writes are temp-file-then-rename, never write-in-place
lastKnownGood.json promotion is gated by calling validate(_:) first, decode success alone is not sufficient
corrupted files are preserved under a timestamped quarantine filename before falling back
load() returns LoadResult carrying a RecoveryNotice whenever recovery occurred, never silently swallowed
markLastActive(at:) is called from scenePhase-to-background wiring, not only clean termination

tasks.title: EntitlementProviding, StoreKitEntitlementService, resolveRegionAccess, privacy manifest
acceptance_criteria: either the lifetime product ID or the subscription satisfies Pro, never hardcoded to just one
Transaction.updates listener task starts at construction time, not lazily on first refresh()
entitlement reads only from StoreKit's local transaction cache, never blocks on a live network call
resolveRegionAccess is the single named function producing RegionAccessState from EntitlementState plus hasLocalRegionTwoData(), with a test matrix covering all four combinations
restoredButLocallyEmpty is derived from local region-two save presence, never from receipt/entitlement presence alone
PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy declares required-reason API usage for UserDefaults and file-timestamp access covering both this file's StoreKit caching and T-005's persistence layer

tasks.title: HistoryRetentionService
acceptance_criteria: append() enforces retentionLimit as a hard cap regardless of entitlement duration
history entries are summary-grade (start/end/health/bottlenecks), never raw per-tick data
buffer is retained (hidden, not deleted) when entitlement lapses

tasks.title: Services integration test suite
acceptance_criteria: 20 consecutive save/relaunch cycles including one force-quit mid-placement and one mid-upgrade produce zero corruption/duplication/silent reset, run against a real temp-directory FileManager
corrupted-save quarantine-then-rollback verified against a real on-disk broken file, not a mock
all four entitlement states exercised against the real .storekit config, including restore in airplane mode
on merge to longwave/integration, post which concrete SnapshotStoring/EntitlementProviding implementations and failure-mode fixtures primary_ui can now build against

tasks.title: Xcode project scaffold, NetworkEngine, and action/presentation contracts
acceptance_criteria: project uses file-system-synchronized groups for the app target, package, and both test targets so lanes never hand-edit project.pbxproj after this task
project.pbxproj becomes a forbidden-edit zone for every other lane from this point forward; new targets/schemes route through a named request to this lane
attemptPlace/attemptMove/attemptRetune/attemptUpgrade are fully synchronous end-to-end, no await between validate and mutate
each attempt* method returns .engineNotReady before bootstrap() completes rather than mutating state or crashing
milestone flags (firstRelayPlaced, firstInterferenceResolved, third goal) are recomputed automatically and idempotently (latch false-to-true only) after every successful attempt* call
fixture initializer produces a fully usable NetworkEngine with no real FileManager/StoreKit access, for Previews/XCTest/XCUITest
primary_ui becomes the standing integrator for all milestone merges from longwave/integration into main from this point forward

tasks.title: App entry point and scene-phase lifecycle wiring
acceptance_criteria: bootstrap() runs on launch and never blocks first frame render on a live network call
handleScenePhaseChange writes lastActiveAt via markLastActive on transition to .background
no BackgroundTasks / BGTaskScheduler usage anywhere

tasks.title: Canvas render surface and map hit-testing/accessibility overlay
acceptance_criteria: the live signal/coverage/interference layer is one Canvas driven by one TimelineView(.animation) fed by plain structs, never a ForEach of individually animated shapes
MapInteractionNode uses the exact same screenPosition conversion as the Canvas renderer so the visible relay dot and its tap target never drift apart
renders correctly at at least one small and one large region size without dropped frames in a manual check

tasks.title: Map screen and build/inspect bottom sheet
acceptance_criteria: every value shown (health, throughput, currency) is read from NetworkDerivedState, never a second/shadow calculation
empty, healthy, strained, choking, placement-preview, selected-relay, offline-return, and recovery-banner states are all implemented and reachable
invalid-placement feedback is persistent, not a flash, and includes a stated reason
health/interference indicators carry a redundant non-color signal
insufficient-funds state disables the confirm action with a stated reason rather than a dead tap

tasks.title: Progression, paywall, and settings screens
acceptance_criteria: progression screen's health value and offline-earnings figure come from the same NetworkDerivedState/OfflineSummary the map uses, verified equal in a test, not a second computation
all four Pro entitlement UI states (never-purchased, active, restored-but-locally-empty, lapsed-frozen) are each a distinct, implemented visual state
restore purchases has its own loading/success/error states
from cold start or resume-with-offline-earnings, the next actionable goal is identifiable without opening a second screen

tasks.title: Engine and UI integration test suite
acceptance_criteria: 10 concurrent attemptPlace/attemptUpgrade calls against a fixture engine produce exactly one currency deduction
attemptPlace called before bootstrap() resolves returns .engineNotReady, does not crash or mutate state
resolveRegionAccess(.notOwned, false) renders lockedUpsell end-to-end through the real UI, not just the pure function
milestone flags flip automatically without a separate explicit call and never un-flip on a later action

tasks.title: VoiceOver custom actions for relays and demand zones
acceptance_criteria: move N/S/E/W, retune up/down, upgrade, and commit/cancel are all exposed as custom actions routed through the same NetworkActioning entry points as drag gestures, never a separate calculation path
each action speaks the projected health/output delta from the same PlacementOutcome the visual delta chip uses, before commit
XCUITest asserts the actions exist and route correctly

tasks.title: Recovery messaging wired into map and settings
acceptance_criteria: every RecoveryNotice case maps to a calm, plain-language string, never raw technical failure text
recovery banner appears on the map only when a RecoveryNotice is present, and the same message is available on the settings screen

tasks.title: Dynamic Type and non-color signaling audit
acceptance_criteria: at largest accessibility Dynamic Type size, the build/inspect sheet and all screens neither clip nor break any control
no health/interference/error state anywhere conveys meaning by color alone
any fix required in a primary_ui-owned file is delivered as a named patch reviewed and merged by the primary_ui owner, never a direct commit

tasks.title: Final hardening: stress re-run, atomicity, performance
acceptance_criteria: 20-cycle save/relaunch stress re-run against the finished app produces zero corruption/duplication/silent reset
rapid double-tap on upgrade/placement actions never double-spends
Canvas render surface holds acceptable frame pacing with a full region of relays placed

tasks.title: Scripted first-session walkthrough and ship gate
acceptance_criteria: walkthrough verifies, using must-have features only: first signal flow success, visible self-inflicted interference from a second relay, recovery via a smarter move, and a legible fourth objective
if the fourth objective doesn't emerge from must-haves alone, the milestone-gated second demand zone is promoted to must-have and T-002's seed content is updated accordingly before ship
one real manual VoiceOver pass is completed and its result recorded, not just XCUITest action-routing checks
